etymology.description: зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, 'silk; thread') + иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, 'speech') = representation of discussion or speaking through shared connections -> phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: The character дңҢ combines зөІ(зөІ) (sД«, 'silk; thread') and иЁҖ(иЁҖ) (yГЎn, 'speech') to symbolize communication or discussion, emphasizing the intertwining nature of conversation.
